title: Large Mining Tower Installed Amidst Ancient Geoglyphs of Andean Culture: The Chug-Chug Este-11 Case in Antofagasta Region
description: El Ciudadano Original article: Torres de la gran minería en zonas de antiguos geoglifos de la cultura andina: El caso de Chug-Chug Este-11, Región de Antofagasta The Chakana Geoglyphs and an Electric Tower: Big Mining and Andean Heritage in Antofagasta An electric tower from CODELCO, associated with the Ministro Hales mine, has been erected next to two [...] La entrada Large Mining Tower Installed Amidst Ancient Geoglyphs of Andean Culture: The Chug-Chug Este-11 Case in Antofagasta Region se publicó primero en El Ciudadano .

title: Ancient teeth reveal gaps in marsupial family tree
description: Fossils discovered in Northwest Queensland suggest more variety among early marsupial fauna.

title: How the invention of glassblowing changed everyday life in ancient Rome
description: We see glass objects every day and often don't think much about them. Mass-produced glass has become so cheap we barely think about the things it allows us to do.
